cases.passage: Savlon, a leading antiseptic brand, has been facing stiff competition from local brands in rural areas. The company has decided to change its distribution strategy to increase its market share in rural areas. It has tied up with local medical stores and has started a door-to-door sales team to reach out to more customers. The company is also offering discounts and free samples to increase sales. However, the company is facing a challenge in maintaining the quality of its products while increasing production.

questions.q: Why did Savlon change its distribution strategy?
opts: (A) To increase its market share in urban areas
(B) To increase its market share in rural areas
questions.explanation: Savlon changed its distribution strategy to increase its market share in rural areas where it was facing stiff competition from local brands.

questions.q: What is the main challenge faced by Savlon in its new distribution strategy?
opts: (A) Maintaining the quality of its products
questions.explanation: The main challenge faced by Savlon is maintaining the quality of its products while increasing production to meet the growing demand.

questions.q: What is the purpose of offering discounts and free samples by Savlon?
questions.explanation: The purpose of offering discounts and free samples by Savlon is to increase sales and attract more customers.

questions.q: What is the new distribution strategy adopted by Savlon?
opts: (A) Tie-up with local medical stores and door-to-door sales team
(B) Tie-up with local medical stores only
questions.explanation: Savlon has tied up with local medical stores and has started a door-to-door sales team as part of its new distribution strategy.

questions.q: Why is Savlon facing stiff competition from local brands in rural areas?
opts: (C) Due to lack of market research
questions.explanation: The passage does not mention why Savlon is facing stiff competition from local brands in rural areas.

cases.passage: A popular online fashion brand, Fashionista, has been struggling to retain its customers due to poor after-sales service. The company has launched a new customer service initiative, 'Fashionista Care', which provides 24x7 support to its customers through phone, email, and social media. The company has also introduced a loyalty program to reward its loyal customers. However, the company is facing a challenge in maintaining the quality of its products and meeting the high expectations of its customers.

questions.q: What is the main reason for Fashionista losing its customers?
questions.explanation: Fashionista is losing its customers due to poor after-sales service, as mentioned in the passage.

questions.q: What is the purpose of launching 'Fashionista Care' initiative?
questions.explanation: The purpose of launching 'Fashionista Care' initiative is to provide 24x7 support to its customers through phone, email, and social media.

questions.q: What is the new customer service initiative launched by Fashionista?
questions.explanation: Fashionista has launched a new customer service initiative called 'Fashionista Care', which provides 24x7 support to its customers.

questions.q: What is the purpose of introducing a loyalty program by Fashionista?
questions.explanation: The purpose of introducing a loyalty program by Fashionista is to reward its loyal customers.

questions.q: What is the main challenge faced by Fashionista in meeting the expectations of its customers?
opts: (A) Maintaining the quality of its products
questions.explanation: The main challenge faced by Fashionista is maintaining the quality of its products to meet the high expectations of its customers.
